title: 6 PCS Christmas Tree Baubles Decorations, Gold Star Hanging Ornaments Glitter Stars Festive Embellishments for Holiday Party, 5cm
features: Christmas Glitter Star Ornament is made of PVC with glitter design, the sparkling effect brings a festive Christmas mood to your home or store.
Pack Contains 6 pieces of glittery 3D Star Baubles. Size of the Glitter Star Baubles: 5cm. They are vibrant and rich in colour and glittery.
Glitter Star Ornaments for your winter wedding Christmas decorations. Add a elegance to your Christmas tree with these decorative ornaments, create a strong festival atmosphere.
With a lanyard, 3D Glitter Star Baubles can be hung on the Christmas tree, window or ceiling and doorway. Beautiful Christmas tree decorated with stars, suitable for festive decoration.
Hanging Glitter Star Baubles on the Christmas tree, window, ceiling or doorways. Beautiful Christmas tree ornament stars, suitable for festival decoration.
description: Product description 6 Pieces of 3D Glitter Star Baubles Glitter Star Ornaments Star Shape Christmas Tree Hanging Ornament Mini Glitter Star Christmas Tree Hanging Pendants Specifications: Material: plastic, glitter Size: 5 x 5 x 1.5cm / 1.97 x 1.97 x 0.59 in Color: Gold Quantity: 6 Pieces Package Includes: 6 x Star Hanging Baubles Ornaments for Xmas Tree Decorations Safety Warning Choking hazard - small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years old.
